mapper.insert: WITH UPSERT AS ( SELECT (SELECT NEXTVAL('nia.seq_alarmno') ::VARCHAR) AS ALARMNO , #{sysname} AS SYSNAME , #{equiptype} AS EQUIPTYPE , #{unit} AS UNIT , #{alarmtime}::TIMESTAMP AS ALARMTIME , #{receivetime}::TIMESTAMP AS RECEIVETIME , #{alarmloc} AS ALARMLOC , #{alarmmsg} AS ALARMMSG , #{alarmlevel} AS ALARMLEVEL , #{lineName} AS LINE_NAME ) INSERT INTO NIA.TB_ALARM_MST ( ALARMNO, SYSNAME, EQUIPTYPE, UNIT, ALARMTIME, RECEIVETIME, ALARMLOC, ALARMMSG, ALARMLEVEL, LINE_NAME ) SELECT U.ALARMNO, U.SYSNAME, U.EQUIPTYPE, U.UNIT, U.ALARMTIME, U.RECEIVETIME, U.ALARMLOC, U.ALARMMSG, U.ALARMLEVEL, U.LINE_NAME FROM UPSERT U WHERE NOT EXISTS( SELECT A.SYSNAME, A.EQUIPTYPE, A.UNIT, A.ALARMTIME, A.RECEIVETIME, A.ALARMLOC, A.ALARMMSG, A.ALARMLEVEL, A.LINE_NAME FROM NIA.TB_ALARM_MST A WHERE A.SYSNAME = U.SYSNAME AND A.UNIT = U.UNIT AND A.RECEIVETIME = U.RECEIVETIME AND A.ALARMLOC = U.ALARMLOC AND A.ALARMMSG = U.ALARMMSG AND A.ALARMLEVEL = U.ALARMLEVEL )
